headline: Digital-First Insurer Zen Insurance Launches in the UK via New Applied Systems, One Call and Verisk Collaboration
summary: A joint effort from Applied, One Call, and Verisk brings a digitally enabled insurance product to market through simplified connectivity for insuredsLONDON, May 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As UK insurers, brokers, and distributors face increasing pressure to control operating costs, improve customer engagement and bring new products to market faster, digital‑first and technology‑enabled insurance models are gaining traction.
